'''Nilesk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A member of the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]], Nilesk served on a committee that matched hunters with [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]. She would typically scan lists of new hunters (usually unknown to her) on her [[datapad/Legends|datapad]], evaluating their stats, while her assistant [[Opdoa]] scanned [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] bounties around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], choosing the most appropriate for each.

Nilesk and Opdoa favored [[Teksli Yenak]] of the [[Chattza clan]] and assigned an easy hunt for him, while they chose something high risk and low pay for [[Fask Eelak]] of the [[An'yettu clan]]. Nilesk expecting Eelak would not survive enough to collect the bounty on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gerraba]], and hoped that even if she succeeded, the judges would "fail" to verify her account for an [[Atiang/Legends|Atiang]]. 

Considering that [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]] was complaining about the "Ultimate Hunters" of the [[Neetakka clan]], Nilesk recommended something long and nearly impossible for [[Geska Gesse]], such as the bounty on [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. She learned from Opdoa that Solo had been collected by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], therefore she suggested to sent Gesse against [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and reassign Solo chasers to the "Most Wanted Rebels" list.

==Appearances==
